warning: SMOKE ARTIFACT -- NOT a benchmark result. The language head is UNTRAINED: initialised from M1 it reproduces the action-only predictor exactly (see models.lang_latent_pred.init_shared_layers_from and tests/test_lang_latent_pred.py::test_init_reproduces_m1_for_any_text), so z_hat_lang := z_hat_action := the real vjepa2_rep64 action-conditioned output and delta_cossim == 0 by construction. cossim_lang/cossim_action ARE real CosSim on the 5419-sequence full-test split, but the per-sample scene->bucket partition is SYNTHETIC: scripts/export_z_hat.py does not currently emit a per-sample scene sidecar (recommended A18 follow-up), so real stratification is not yet possible. Regenerate real numbers with a trained language head, real C6 captions (python -m data.scene_captions), and a real sample-scene sidecar via: python -m evaluation.lang_scene_eval.
